title: Smart Garden Christmas Infinity Mirror Effect 3D Christmas Tree LED Light – 40cm Green Festive Decoration – Illuminated 3D Effect Xmas Ornament for Home, Table or Windowsill
features: 3D LIGHT EFFECT – Features an infinity mirror design with glowing green LEDs that create a magical illusion of endless depth and sparkle
FESTIVE DECORATION FOR ANY ROOM – Ideal for tables, mantels, or windowsills, adding a warm and enchanting glow to your Christmas décor
MAINS POWERED FOR CONTINUOUS LIGHT – Plug-in power source provides reliable, bright illumination without the hassle of replacing batteries
ENERGY-EFFICIENT LED LIGHTS – Low-energy bulbs stay cool to the touch while delivering vibrant festive colour, safe for indoor use
STYLISH AND STABLE DESIGN – Stands 40 cm tall with a sturdy base that keeps the decoration steady, ensuring long-lasting seasonal enjoyment
description: Product description Add a dazzling festive glow to your home with the Smart Garden Christmas Infinity Mirror Effect 3D Christmas Tree LED Light. Standing 40 cm tall, this striking decoration features a captivating infinity mirror design that creates a 3D illusion of endless glowing green lights, bringing a magical touch to your seasonal décor. Perfect for adding ambience to any room, this freestanding tree looks beautiful on a mantelpiece, table, or windowsill. The vibrant LEDs illuminate through the mirrored layers, producing an eye-catching depth effect that enhances your Christmas display. Designed for indoor use, it delivers the perfect balance of modern style and traditional holiday charm. The tree is powered by a mains plug, ensuring continuous and consistent illumination without the need for batteries. Energy-efficient LED lights provide a bright yet gentle glow that remains cool to the touch, making it safe and cost-effective to use throughout the festive season. Whether displayed on its own or as part of a larger arrangement, this Smart Garden 3D LED Christmas Tree is a stunning centrepiece that will bring joy, light, and festive spirit to your home year after year. Safety Warning Outdoor use only. Unplug during inclement weather. Do not allow children to play on or near the display. Keep away from flammable materials. This product is intended for use by adults and should not be operated by children. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions for use and storage.
